name: Kenneth Quass Parents
researcher_question: Who were Kenneth Werner Quass's parents?
notes: The 1920 census transcribes the Quass surname as 'Ovass' — a common OCR/transcription variant that may complicate searches. Evidence is available in the 1920 and 1930 Iowa census records and the 1917 Iowa County Birth record. Parents are Ralph Kennedy Quass (KFYQ-1Y2) and Emma Wilhelmina Nehls (KNSY-35C), married 16 Dec 1915 in Independence, Buchanan, Iowa.
